vehicle.label: Small Launch Vehicle (sounding)
vehicle.desc: Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator

parts.spec: Non-functional stage_engine_mock with bell_nozzle_shell, cutaway_window, engine_display_cartridge slide_rail, educational label only

parts.label: Payload Fairing Display Shell
parts.spec: Primary_structure payload_fairing/nose_cone display shell with split seam, inspection window, acoustic blanket labels, no flight-performance claim

parts.label: Fin Set x 4 Display Mock
parts.spec: Primary_structure fin_set display mock with root tabs, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, inspection callouts, no stability/performance claim

parts.label: Avionics Bay Mock Tray
parts.spec: Avionics_bay educational tray with board_standoff, harness_passthrough, connector labels, EMI shield mock, no ordnance or flight computer authority

parts.label: Battery/Power Display Module
parts.spec: Power_display battery_module dummy with access_panel, keyed connector label, service cover, mass budget note, no live energy system

parts.label: Recovery Bay Display Dummy
parts.spec: Recovery_bay educational display dummy with deploy_door, hinge, parachute volume label, inspection window, no deployment charge or flight recovery instruction

parts.label: Integration Inspection Ring

requirements: Primary_structure payload_fairing/nose_cone display shell with split seam, inspection window, acoustic blanket labels, no flight-performance claim
Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator
Educational display mockup, no propulsion, ignition, or flight-performance design
Material: Al 7075 + CFRP + Inconel + ablative
Process: LPBF + CFRP layup

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to LPBF process limitations.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough static load testing and reinforce critical areas.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment keys.
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment keys and conduct pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Cable routing may become tangled if not properly managed.
risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and clear labeling of cables.

risk.desc: Incorrect mating of connectors could lead to system failure.
risk.mit: Label connectors clearly and ensure they are easily accessible.

risk.desc: Inadequate heat dissipation from display components.
risk.mit: Increase surface area of heat-dissipating features or add cooling fins.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of bolt_circle_dummy may affect structural integrity.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough alignment checks during assembly and use precise manufacturing techniques.

risk.desc: Cutaway_window may not provide sufficient visibility if obstructed by internal components.
risk.mit: Ensure clearances are maintained between cutaway_window and internal parts.

risk.desc: Improper strain relief for cables exiting cutaway_window could lead to damage.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry at all cable exits.

risk.desc: Engine_display_cartridge may not align properly with slide_rail due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Use precision manufacturing and alignment tools during assembly.

risk.desc: Removal of engine_display_cartridge may be difficult if fasteners are not properly preloaded.
risk.mit: Ensure all fasteners are torqued to specified values and locking mechanisms are in place.

generated_parts.label: Turbopump Assembly Display Dummy
generated_parts.spec: Non-functional turbopump_assembly_dummy with impeller_dummy, service cutaway bay, slide_rail, inspection label, no pump performance claim

requirements: Non-functional turbopump_assembly_dummy with impeller_dummy, service cutaway bay, slide_rail, inspection label, no pump performance claim
Removable engine display cartridge
Combustion chamber dummy, bell nozzle shell, turbopump assembly dummy, impeller dummy, stage engine mock, cutaway window, slide rail
Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only
Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge
Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming
Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review
